testcase.name: test_list_references_public_for_logged_users

skipped.message: Cannot register normal user: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.","input":"TEST_user_3dde0cc7@medrev.test","ctx":{"reason":"The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email."}},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"TEST_user_3dde0cc7@medrev.test","password":"Test1234!","full_name":"Test User"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]}
